question: 请问有哪些专利已经有IPC分类，但完全没有归属任何技术领域（TechDomain）？给我看20条就行。
cypher:
MATCH (p:Patent)-[:CLASSIFIED_AS]->(:IPCCode)
WHERE NOT EXISTS { MATCH (p)-[:BELONGS_TO]->(:TechDomain) }
WITH DISTINCT p
RETURN p.application_no AS application_no, p.title AS title, substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) AS year
ORDER BY year DESC, application_no
LIMIT 20

question: 帮忙查一下：浙江省有哪些机构从来没有作为申请人提交过专利？
cypher:
MATCH (o:Organization)-[:LOCATED_IN]->(loc:Location)
WHERE loc.province = '浙江省'
  AND NOT EXISTS { MATCH (:Patent)-[:APPLIED_BY]->(o) }
RETURN o.name AS org, coalesce(loc.city, '未知') AS city
ORDER BY org
LIMIT 30

question: 我想知道：哪些专利同时被归类到H01M和C25B两个IPC前缀？
请分析：哪些专利存在多个法律状态记录，并且同时发生过转让（TRANSFERRED_TO）？
cypher:
MATCH (p:Patent)-[:HAS_STATUS]->(ls:LegalStatus)
WITH p, collect(DISTINCT ls.name) AS statuses
WHERE size(statuses) >= 2
  AND EXISTS { MATCH (p)-[:TRANSFERRED_TO]->(:Organization) }
RETURN p.application_no AS application_no, p.title AS title, statuses
ORDER BY size(statuses) DESC, application_no
LIMIT 20

question: 有没有可能存在：同一家机构既是权利人又是受让方，但申请人却是另一家机构的专利？给我举例。
cypher:
MATCH (p:Patent)-[:TRANSFERRED_TO]->(x:Organization)
MATCH (p)-[:OWNED_BY]->(x)
MATCH (p)-[:APPLIED_BY]->(a:Organization)
WHERE a <> x
RETURN p.application_no AS application_no, p.title AS title, a.name AS applicant, x.name AS owner_and_transferee
ORDER BY application_no
LIMIT 20

question: 请分析：哪些专利转让双方在同一省份但不同城市（基于TRANSFERRED_FROM/TRANSFERRED_TO的机构LOCATED_IN）？
cypher:
MATCH (p:Patent)-[:TRANSFERRED_FROM]->(from:Organization)-[:LOCATED_IN]->(loc1:Location)
MATCH (p)-[:TRANSFERRED_TO]->(to:Organization)-[:LOCATED_IN]->(loc2:Location)
WHERE loc1.province = loc2.province AND loc1.city <> loc2.city
RETURN p.application_no AS application_no, p.title AS title, loc1.province AS province, loc1.city AS from_city, loc2.city AS to_city
ORDER BY province, from_city, to_city
LIMIT 20

question: 我想了解：哪些专利族的所有成员都只在同一个国家公开？并且专利族规模至少3件。
cypher:
MATCH (f:PatentFamily)<-[:IN_FAMILY]-(p:Patent)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(c:Country)
WITH f, collect(DISTINCT c.code) AS countries, count(DISTINCT p) AS n
WHERE n >= 3 AND size(countries) = 1
RETURN f.family_id AS family_id, n AS family_size, countries[0] AS only_country
ORDER BY family_size DESC
LIMIT 20

question: 请问有哪些专利族同时覆盖“制氢技术”和“储氢技术”两个领域？
cypher:
MATCH (f:PatentFamily)<-[:IN_FAMILY]-(p:Patent)-[:BELONGS_TO]->(d:TechDomain)
WITH f, collect(DISTINCT d.name) AS domains, count(DISTINCT p) AS n
WHERE '制氢技术' IN domains AND '储氢技术' IN domains
RETURN f.family_id AS family_id, n AS family_size, domains
ORDER BY family_size DESC
LIMIT 20

question: 想知道：哪些专利族同时出现过“授权”和“驳回”的成员状态？

MATCH (f:PatentFamily)<-[:IN_FAMILY]-(p:Patent)-[:HAS_STATUS]->(ls:LegalStatus)
WITH f, collect(DISTINCT ls.name) AS statuses, count(DISTINCT p) AS n
WHERE '授权' IN statuses AND '驳回' IN statuses
RETURN f.family_id AS family_id, n AS family_size, statuses
ORDER BY family_size DESC
LIMIT 20

question: 请分析：哪些专利族的IPC前缀（取前4位）至少覆盖4类？
cypher:
MATCH (f:PatentFamily)<-[:IN_FAMILY]-(p:Patent)-[:CLASSIFIED_AS]->(ipc:IPCCode)
WITH f, collect(DISTINCT substring(ipc.code, 0, 4)) AS prefixes, count(DISTINCT p) AS n
WHERE size(prefixes) >= 4
RETURN f.family_id AS family_id, n AS family_size, prefixes
ORDER BY size(prefixes) DESC, family_size DESC
LIMIT 20

question: 有没有专利族满足：族内至少一件专利发生过转让（TRANSFERRED_TO），同时族内至少一件专利发生过质押（PLEDGED_TO）？
cypher:
MATCH (f:PatentFamily)<-[:IN_FAMILY]-(p:Patent)
WITH f, collect(DISTINCT p) AS ps
WHERE any(x IN ps WHERE EXISTS { MATCH (x)-[:TRANSFERRED_TO]->(:Organization) })
  AND any(x IN ps WHERE EXISTS { MATCH (x)-[:PLEDGED_TO]->(:Organization) })
RETURN f.family_id AS family_id, size(ps) AS family_size
ORDER BY family_size DESC
LIMIT 20

question: 请问哪些专利族的所有成员申请机构都来自同一个省份？返回省份信息。

WITH f, collect(DISTINCT loc.province) AS provinces, count(DISTINCT p) AS n
WHERE n > 1 AND size(provinces) = 1
RETURN f.family_id AS family_id, n AS family_size, provinces[0] AS province
ORDER BY family_size DESC
LIMIT 20

question: 我想知道：公开国家至少覆盖3个国家代码的专利族有哪些？

question: 请分析：哪些专利族的权利人（OWNED_BY）分散度很高，比如至少涉及3家不同机构？

question: 能否找出：同一个专利族里既有H01M成员又有C25B成员的专利族？
cypher:
MATCH (f:PatentFamily)<-[:IN_FAMILY]-(p:Patent)
WITH f, collect(DISTINCT p) AS ps
WHERE any(x IN ps WHERE EXISTS { MATCH (x)-[:CLASSIFIED_AS]->(i:IPCCode) WHERE i.code STARTS WITH 'H01M' })
  AND any(x IN ps WHERE EXISTS { MATCH (x)-[:CLASSIFIED_AS]->(j:IPCCode) WHERE j.code STARTS WITH 'C25B' })
RETURN f.family_id AS family_id, size(ps) AS family_size
ORDER BY family_size DESC
LIMIT 20

question: 请问哪些专利族的申请年份跨度很大（最大年-最小年>=6年）？
cypher:
MATCH (f:PatentFamily)<-[:IN_FAMILY]-(p:Patent)
WITH f,
     min(toInteger(substring(p.application_date, 0, 4))) AS minYear,
     max(toInteger(substring(p.application_date, 0, 4))) AS maxYear,
     count(DISTINCT p) AS n
WHERE (maxYear - minYear) >= 6
RETURN f.family_id AS family_id, n AS family_size, minYear, maxYear, (maxYear - minYear) AS year_span
ORDER BY year_span DESC, family_size DESC
LIMIT 20

question: 想了解：哪些专利族完全没有“撤回”状态成员？
cypher:

WITH f, collect(DISTINCT p) AS ps
WHERE none(x IN ps WHERE EXISTS { MATCH (x)-[:HAS_STATUS]->(:LegalStatus {name:'撤回'}) })
RETURN f.family_id AS family_id, size(ps) AS family_size
ORDER BY family_size DESC
LIMIT 20

question: 请问有没有专利族满足：族内每个成员都有至少一个IPC分类？

question: 我想知道“中车株洲电力机车研究所有限公司”作为权利人时，专利分布在哪些专利族？返回专利族列表和数量。

question: 请分析：哪些专利族同时包含公司申请的成员和高校申请的成员？

question: 想了解：哪些专利族的公开国家全部限定在中日韩（CN/JP/KR），且至少覆盖其中2个国家？

  AND all(code IN codes WHERE code IN ['CN','JP','KR'])
  AND size(codes) >= 2
RETURN f.family_id AS family_id, n AS family_size, codes AS countries
ORDER BY size(codes) DESC, family_size DESC
LIMIT 20

question: 请问哪些专利族内出现了至少两种不同诉讼类型？

question: 请分析：在GB公开的专利里，申请机构在中国但权利人不在中国的有哪些？

MATCH (p:Patent)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(:Country {code:'GB'})
MATCH (p)-[:APPLIED_BY]->(a:Organization)-[:LOCATED_IN]->(al:Location)

WHERE al.country = '中国' AND ol.country <> '中国'
RETURN p.application_no AS application_no, p.title AS title, a.name AS applicant, o.name AS owner, ol.country AS owner_country
ORDER BY application_no
LIMIT 20

question: 我想知道：境外公开（非CN）且已授权的专利，主要来自哪些省份的申请机构？
cypher:

question: 请分析各省：以申请机构所在地为准，储氢技术（含其子域）专利占该省全部氢能专利的比例是多少？
cypher:
MATCH (p:Patent)-[:APPLIED_BY]->(:Organization)-[:LOCATED_IN]->(loc:Location)
WITH loc.province AS province, collect(DISTINCT p) AS ps
WITH province,
     size(ps) AS total,
     size([x IN ps WHERE EXISTS {
       MATCH (x)-[:BELONGS_TO]->(d:TechDomain)-[:PARENT_DOMAIN*0..]->(:TechDomain {name:'储氢技术'})
     }]) AS storage_cnt
RETURN province, total, storage_cnt,
       CASE WHEN total = 0 THEN 0.0 ELSE toFloat(storage_cnt) / total END AS storage_share
ORDER BY storage_share DESC
LIMIT 20

question: 想了解：在CN公开的专利里，公司与高校的授权率分别是多少？（授权数/总数）
cypher:
MATCH (p:Patent)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(:Country {code:'CN'})
MATCH (p)-[:APPLIED_BY]->(o:Organization)
OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[:HAS_STATUS]->(ls:LegalStatus)
WITH o.entity_type AS type,
     count(DISTINCT p) AS total,
     count(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ls.name = '授权' THEN p END) AS authorized
WHERE type IN ['company','university']
RETURN type, total, authorized,
       CASE WHEN total = 0 THEN 0.0 ELSE toFloat(authorized) / total END AS auth_rate
ORDER BY auth_rate DESC

question: 请问广东省各城市申请的专利中，境外公开（非CN）的占比各是多少？

WHERE loc.province = '广东省'
MATCH (p)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(c:Country)
WITH coalesce(loc.city,'未知') AS city,
     count(DISTINCT p) AS total,
     count(DISTINCT CASE WHEN c.code <> 'CN' THEN p END) AS abroad
RETURN city, total, abroad,
       CASE WHEN total = 0 THEN 0.0 ELSE toFloat(abroad) / total END AS abroad_share
ORDER BY abroad_share DESC
LIMIT 20

question: 请分析名称包含“能源”的机构：其拥有专利数/申请专利数的比值是多少？返回TOP20。
cypher:
MATCH (o:Organization)
WHERE o.name CONTAINS '能源'
OPTIONAL MATCH (pA:Patent)-[:APPLIED_BY]->(o)
OPTIONAL MATCH (pO:Patent)-[:OWNED_BY]->(o)
WITH o, count(DISTINCT pA) AS applied, count(DISTINCT pO) AS owned
RETURN o.name AS org, applied, owned,
       CASE WHEN applied = 0 THEN null ELSE toFloat(owned) / applied END AS owned_to_applied
ORDER BY owned_to_applied DESC
LIMIT 20

question: 我想知道：H01M类专利的涉诉率与非H01M专利的涉诉率对比如何？
cypher:
MATCH (p:Patent)
WITH p,
     CASE WHEN EXISTS { MATCH (p)-[:CLASSIFIED_AS]->(ipc:IPCCode) WHERE ipc.code STARTS WITH 'H01M' }
          THEN 'H01M' ELSE '非H01M' END AS grp
WITH grp, collect(DISTINCT p) AS ps
WITH grp,
     size(ps) AS total,
     size([x IN ps WHERE EXISTS { MATCH (x)-[:LITIGATED_WITH]->(:Organization) }]) AS litigated
RETURN grp, total, litigated,
       CASE WHEN total = 0 THEN 0.0 ELSE toFloat(litigated) / total END AS litigation_rate
ORDER BY litigation_rate DESC

question: 请分析：按申请年份统计，进入专利族（IN_FAMILY）的比例是多少？

WITH year,
     size(ps) AS total,
     size([x IN ps WHERE EXISTS { MATCH (x)-[:IN_FAMILY]->(:PatentFamily) }]) AS in_family
RETURN year, total, in_family,
       CASE WHEN total = 0 THEN 0.0 ELSE toFloat(in_family) / total END AS family_rate
ORDER BY year DESC
LIMIT 15

question: 想了解：制氢技术 vs 储氢技术，两类专利平均每件包含多少个IPC分类？

question: 请分析各省：发生过任一业务事件（转让/许可/质押）的专利占比是多少？
cypher:
MATCH (p:Patent)-[:APPLIED_BY]->(:Organization)-[:LOCATED_IN]->(loc:Location)
WITH loc.province AS province, collect(DISTINCT p) AS ps
WITH province,
     size(ps) AS total,
     size([x IN ps WHERE
       EXISTS { MATCH (x)-[:TRANSFERRED_TO]->(:Organization) } OR
       EXISTS { MATCH (x)-[:LICENSED_TO]->(:Organization) } OR
       EXISTS { MATCH (x)-[:PLEDGED_TO]->(:Organization) }
     ]) AS with_event
RETURN province, total, with_event,
       CASE WHEN total = 0 THEN 0.0 ELSE toFloat(with_event) / total END AS event_rate
ORDER BY event_rate DESC
LIMIT 20

question: 请分析：按二级技术域（若有父域取父域）统计驳回率（驳回数/总数）。
cypher:
MATCH (p:Patent)-[:BELONGS_TO]->(d:TechDomain)
OPTIONAL MATCH (d)-[:PARENT_DOMAIN]->(parent:TechDomain)
WITH p, coalesce(parent, d) AS grp
OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[:HAS_STATUS]->(ls:LegalStatus)
WITH grp.name AS domain,
     count(DISTINCT p) AS total,
     count(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ls.name = '驳回' THEN p END) AS rejected
RETURN domain, total, rejected,
       CASE WHEN total = 0 THEN 0.0 ELSE toFloat(rejected) / total END AS reject_rate
ORDER BY reject_rate DESC
LIMIT 20

question: 想了解：不同机构类型（company/university/institute）的涉诉率分别是多少？（涉诉专利数/总专利数）
cypher:
MATCH (p:Patent)-[:APPLIED_BY]->(o:Organization)
WITH o.entity_type AS type, collect(DISTINCT p) AS ps
WITH type,
     size(ps) AS total,
     size([x IN ps WHERE EXISTS { MATCH (x)-[:LITIGATED_WITH]->(:Organization) }]) AS litigated
RETURN type, total, litigated,
       CASE WHEN total = 0 THEN 0.0 ELSE toFloat(litigated) / total END AS litigation_rate
ORDER BY litigation_rate DESC

question: 请对比：山东省 vs 河南省，H01M类专利占比各是多少？（H01M专利数/总专利数）
cypher:
MATCH (p:Patent)-[:APPLIED_BY]->(:Organization)-[:LOCATED_IN]->(loc:Location)
WHERE loc.province IN ['山东省','河南省']
WITH loc.province AS province, collect(DISTINCT p) AS ps
WITH province,
     size(ps) AS total,
     size([x IN ps WHERE EXISTS { MATCH (x)-[:CLASSIFIED_AS]->(ipc:IPCCode) WHERE ipc.code STARTS WITH 'H01M' }]) AS h01m
RETURN province, total, h01m,
       CASE WHEN total = 0 THEN 0.0 ELSE toFloat(h01m) / total END AS h01m_share
ORDER BY h01m_share DESC

question: 我想知道：申请量TOP10的机构中，各自US公开专利占比是多少？
cypher:
MATCH (o:Organization)<-[:APPLIED_BY]-(p:Patent)
WITH o, count(DISTINCT p) AS total
ORDER BY total DESC
LIMIT 10
MATCH (o)<-[:APPLIED_BY]-(p2:Patent)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(c:Country)
WITH o, total, count(DISTINCT CASE WHEN c.code = 'US' THEN p2 END) AS us_cnt
RETURN o.name AS org, total, us_cnt,
       CASE WHEN total = 0 THEN 0.0 ELSE toFloat(us_cnt) / total END AS us_share
ORDER BY us_share DESC

question: 请分析：按公开国家统计，C25B类专利占该国全部公开专利的比例是多少？
cypher:
MATCH (p:Patent)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(c:Country)
WITH c, collect(DISTINCT p) AS ps
WITH c.code AS country, ps,
     size(ps) AS total,
     size([x IN ps WHERE EXISTS { MATCH (x)-[:CLASSIFIED_AS]->(ipc:IPCCode) WHERE ipc.code STARTS WITH 'C25B' }]) AS c25b
RETURN country, total, c25b,
       CASE WHEN total = 0 THEN 0.0 ELSE toFloat(c25b) / total END AS c25b_share
ORDER BY c25b_share DESC
LIMIT 20

question: 麻烦统计：按申请年份看，发生过许可（LICENSED_TO）的专利占比是多少？
cypher:
MATCH (p:Patent)
WITH substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) AS year, collect(DISTINCT p) AS ps
WITH year,
     size(ps) AS total,
     size([x IN ps WHERE EXISTS { MATCH (x)-[:LICENSED_TO]->(:Organization) }]) AS licensed
RETURN year, total, licensed,
       CASE WHEN total = 0 THEN 0.0 ELSE toFloat(licensed) / total END AS license_rate
ORDER BY year DESC
LIMIT 15

question: 请分析各省：机构层面汇总转入（TRANSFERRED_TO）与转出（TRANSFERRED_FROM）专利数量，并给出净值（转入-转出）。
cypher:
MATCH (o:Organization)-[:LOCATED_IN]->(loc:Location)
WITH o, loc.province AS province
OPTIONAL MATCH (pIn:Patent)-[:TRANSFERRED_TO]->(o)
OPTIONAL MATCH (pOut:Patent)-[:TRANSFERRED_FROM]->(o)
WITH province, count(DISTINCT pIn) AS transferred_in, count(DISTINCT pOut) AS transferred_out
RETURN province, transferred_in, transferred_out, (transferred_in - transferred_out) AS net_transfer
ORDER BY net_transfer DESC
LIMIT 20

question: 我想知道：按专利族最早申请年份统计，跨国专利族（公开国家>=2）占比是多少？
cypher:
MATCH (f:PatentFamily)<-[:IN_FAMILY]-(p:Patent)
WITH f, min(substring(p.application_date, 0, 4)) AS firstYear
MATCH (f)<-[:IN_FAMILY]-(p2:Patent)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(c:Country)
WITH firstYear AS year, f, collect(DISTINCT c.code) AS countries
WITH year,
     count(DISTINCT f) AS families_total,
     count(DISTINCT CASE WHEN size(countries) >= 2 THEN f END) AS cross_families
RETURN year, families_total, cross_families,
       CASE WHEN families_total = 0 THEN 0.0 ELSE toFloat(cross_families) / families_total END AS cross_family_rate
ORDER BY year DESC
LIMIT 20

question: 请给我一份2024年申请专利的“全量画像”：申请人、权利人、技术领域、专利族、公开国家、法律状态列表、IPC列表（缺失则填默认）。
cypher:
MATCH (p:Patent)
WHERE substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) = '2024'
OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[:APPLIED_BY]->(a:Organization)
OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[:OWNED_BY]->(o:Organization)
OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[:BELONGS_TO]->(d:TechDomain)
OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[:IN_FAMILY]->(f:PatentFamily)
OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(c:Country)
OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[:HAS_STATUS]->(ls:LegalStatus)
OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[:CLASSIFIED_AS]->(ipc:IPCCode)
WITH p, a, o, d, f, c, collect(DISTINCT ls.name) AS statuses, collect(DISTINCT ipc.code) AS ipcs
RETURN p.application_no AS application_no,
       p.title AS title,
       coalesce(a.name,'未知') AS applicant,
       coalesce(o.name,'未知') AS owner,
       coalesce(d.name,'未知') AS domain,
       coalesce(f.family_id,'无') AS family_id,
       coalesce(c.code,'未知') AS country,
       CASE WHEN size(statuses)=0 THEN ['未知'] ELSE statuses END AS statuses,
       ipcs
ORDER BY p.application_date DESC
LIMIT 20

question: 想了解：名称包含“氢能”或“燃料电池”的机构，能否汇总其申请/拥有/转入/转出/许可进出/质押进出数量，并带上省市？
cypher:
MATCH (o:Organization)
WHERE o.name CONTAINS '氢能' OR o.name CONTAINS '燃料电池'
OPTIONAL MATCH (o)-[:LOCATED_IN]->(loc:Location)
OPTIONAL MATCH (pA:Patent)-[:APPLIED_BY]->(o)
OPTIONAL MATCH (pO:Patent)-[:OWNED_BY]->(o)
OPTIONAL MATCH (pTin:Patent)-[:TRANSFERRED_TO]->(o)
OPTIONAL MATCH (pTout:Patent)-[:TRANSFERRED_FROM]->(o)
OPTIONAL MATCH (pLin:Patent)-[:LICENSED_TO]->(o)
OPTIONAL MATCH (pLout:Patent)-[:LICENSED_FROM]->(o)
OPTIONAL MATCH (pPin:Patent)-[:PLEDGED_TO]->(o)
OPTIONAL MATCH (pPout:Patent)-[:PLEDGED_FROM]->(o)
RETURN o.name AS org,
       coalesce(loc.province,'未知') AS province,
       coalesce(loc.city,'未知') AS city,
       count(DISTINCT pA) AS applied_cnt,
       count(DISTINCT pO) AS owned_cnt,
       count(DISTINCT pTin) AS transferred_in,
       count(DISTINCT pTout) AS transferred_out,
       count(DISTINCT pLin) AS licensed_in,
       count(DISTINCT pLout) AS licensed_out,
       count(DISTINCT pPin) AS pledged_in,
       count(DISTINCT pPout) AS pledged_out
ORDER BY applied_cnt DESC
LIMIT 20

question: 请问能否给出专利族概览：成员申请号样例、公开国家列表、法律状态列表、技术领域列表，以及该族是否存在涉诉成员？
cypher:
MATCH (f:PatentFamily)
MATCH (f)<-[:IN_FAMILY]-(p:Patent)
OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(c:Country)
OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[:HAS_STATUS]->(ls:LegalStatus)
OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[:BELONGS_TO]->(d:TechDomain)
WITH f,
     collect(DISTINCT p.application_no) AS members,
     collect(DISTINCT c.code) AS countries,
     collect(DISTINCT ls.name) AS statuses,
     collect(DISTINCT d.name) AS domains,
     collect(DISTINCT p) AS ps
RETURN f.family_id AS family_id,
       size(members) AS family_size,
       members[0..10] AS sample_members,
       countries,
       CASE WHEN size(statuses)=0 THEN ['未知'] ELSE statuses END AS statuses,
       domains,
       CASE WHEN any(x IN ps WHERE EXISTS { MATCH (x)-[:LITIGATED_WITH]->(:Organization) }) THEN '是' ELSE '否' END AS has_litigation
ORDER BY family_size DESC
LIMIT 20

question: 想了解诉讼画像：按对方机构汇总其涉及的专利数量、角色role集合、诉讼类型集合和专利法律状态集合（各取样例）。
cypher:
MATCH (p:Patent)-[lw:LITIGATED_WITH]->(opp:Organization)
OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[:HAS_LITIGATION_TYPE]->(lt:LitigationType)
OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[:HAS_STATUS]->(ls:LegalStatus)
WITH opp,
     collect(DISTINCT p.application_no) AS patents,
     collect(DISTINCT coalesce(lw.role,'未知')) AS roles,
     collect(DISTINCT coalesce(lt.name,'未知')) AS types,
     collect(DISTINCT coalesce(ls.name,'未知')) AS statuses
RETURN opp.name AS opponent,
       size(patents) AS involved_patents,
       patents[0..10] AS sample_patents,
       roles,
       types,
       statuses
ORDER BY involved_patents DESC
LIMIT 20

question: 请分析储氢技术各三级子域：专利总数、授权数、涉诉数分别是多少？
cypher:
MATCH (d3:TechDomain {level:3})-[:PARENT_DOMAIN*]->(:TechDomain {name:'储氢技术'})
OPTIONAL MATCH (p:Patent)-[:BELONGS_TO]->(d3)
WITH d3, collect(DISTINCT p) AS ps
WITH d3,
     size(ps) AS total,
     size([x IN ps WHERE EXISTS { MATCH (x)-[:HAS_STATUS]->(:LegalStatus {name:'授权'}) }]) AS authorized,
     size([x IN ps WHERE EXISTS { MATCH (x)-[:LITIGATED_WITH]->(:Organization) }]) AS litigated
RETURN d3.name AS domain, total, authorized, litigated
ORDER BY total DESC
LIMIT 20

question: 我想知道：2022年申请的专利中，哪些缺少权利人记录？并补充其申请人、领域、法律状态、公开国家（如有）。
cypher:
MATCH (p:Patent)
WHERE substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) = '2022'
  AND NOT EXISTS { MATCH (p)-[:OWNED_BY]->(:Organization) }
OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[:APPLIED_BY]->(a:Organization)
OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[:BELONGS_TO]->(d:TechDomain)
OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[:HAS_STATUS]->(ls:LegalStatus)
OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(c:Country)
RETURN p.application_no AS application_no,
       p.title AS title,
       coalesce(a.name,'未知') AS applicant,
       coalesce(d.name,'未知') AS domain,
       coalesce(ls.name,'未知') AS status,
       coalesce(c.code,'未知') AS country
ORDER BY application_no
LIMIT 25

question: 想了解人员画像：人员-机构-省份，并返回该机构申请专利数量以及涉及的技术领域列表。
cypher:
MATCH (per:Person)-[:AFFILIATED_WITH]->(o:Organization)
OPTIONAL MATCH (o)-[:LOCATED_IN]->(loc:Location)
OPTIONAL MATCH (pat:Patent)-[:APPLIED_BY]->(o)-[:BELONGS_TO]->(d:TechDomain)
WITH per, o, coalesce(loc.province,'未知') AS province,
     count(DISTINCT pat) AS patents,
     collect(DISTINCT d.name) AS domains
RETURN per.name AS person, o.name AS org, province, patents, domains
ORDER BY patents DESC
LIMIT 30

question: 请问被“银行”类机构质押的专利，能否同时返回银行省份与专利法律状态？
cypher:
MATCH (p:Patent)-[:PLEDGED_TO]->(bank:Organization)
WHERE bank.name CONTAINS '银行'
OPTIONAL MATCH (bank)-[:LOCATED_IN]->(bloc:Location)
OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[:HAS_STATUS]->(ls:LegalStatus)
RETURN p.application_no AS application_no, p.title AS title,
       bank.name AS bank,
       coalesce(bloc.province,'未知') AS bank_province,
       coalesce(ls.name,'未知') AS status
ORDER BY application_no
LIMIT 25

question: 想了解转让清单：请列出专利的转出/转入机构及其省份，并带上公开国家和申请年份（缺失则显示未知）。
cypher:
MATCH (p:Patent)-[:TRANSFERRED_FROM]->(from:Organization)
MATCH (p)-[:TRANSFERRED_TO]->(to:Organization)
OPTIONAL MATCH (from)-[:LOCATED_IN]->(l1:Location)
OPTIONAL MATCH (to)-[:LOCATED_IN]->(l2:Location)
OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(c:Country)
RETURN p.application_no AS application_no,
       p.title AS title,
       coalesce(l1.province,'未知') AS from_province,
       coalesce(l2.province,'未知') AS to_province,
       coalesce(c.code,'未知') AS country,
       substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) AS year
ORDER BY year DESC, application_no
LIMIT 25

question: 请问哪些专利拥有至少3个不同IPC分类？并把IPC代码与描述一起列出来。
cypher:
MATCH (p:Patent)-[:CLASSIFIED_AS]->(ipc:IPCCode)
WITH p, collect(DISTINCT {code: ipc.code, desc: ipc.description}) AS ipcs
WHERE size(ipcs) >= 3
RETURN p.application_no AS application_no, p.title AS title, ipcs
ORDER BY size(ipcs) DESC
LIMIT 20

question: 我想知道：北京市机构申请的专利中，公开国家至少覆盖两个国家的机构有哪些？并返回国家列表。
cypher:
MATCH (o:Organization)-[:LOCATED_IN]->(loc:Location)
WHERE loc.province = '北京市'
MATCH (p:Patent)-[:APPLIED_BY]->(o)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(c:Country)
WITH o, collect(DISTINCT c.code) AS countries, count(DISTINCT p) AS patents
WHERE size(countries) >= 2
RETURN o.name AS org, patents, countries
ORDER BY size(countries) DESC, patents DESC
LIMIT 20

question: 想了解：在CN公开、且其专利族跨至少2个国家的专利有哪些？同时返回该专利的状态与权利人。
cypher:
MATCH (p:Patent)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(:Country {code:'CN'})
MATCH (p)-[:IN_FAMILY]->(f:PatentFamily)
MATCH (f)<-[:IN_FAMILY]-(m:Patent)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(c:Country)
WITH p, f, collect(DISTINCT c.code) AS countries
WHERE size(countries) >= 2
OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[:HAS_STATUS]->(ls:LegalStatus)
OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[:OWNED_BY]->(o:Organization)
RETURN p.application_no AS application_no, p.title AS title,
       f.family_id AS family_id, countries,
       coalesce(ls.name,'未知') AS status,
       coalesce(o.name,'未知') AS owner
ORDER BY application_no
LIMIT 20

question: 请给我看看专利业务事件标记：每件专利是否发生许可/质押/转让/诉讼（是/否）。
cypher:
MATCH (p:Patent)
WITH p,
     CASE WHEN EXISTS { MATCH (p)-[:LICENSED_TO]->(:Organization) } THEN '是' ELSE '否' END AS has_license,
     CASE WHEN EXISTS { MATCH (p)-[:PLEDGED_TO]->(:Organization) } THEN '是' ELSE '否' END AS has_pledge,
     CASE WHEN EXISTS { MATCH (p)-[:TRANSFERRED_TO]->(:Organization) } THEN '是' ELSE '否' END AS has_transfer,
     CASE WHEN EXISTS { MATCH (p)-[:LITIGATED_WITH]->(:Organization) } THEN '是' ELSE '否' END AS has_litigation
RETURN p.application_no AS application_no, p.title AS title, has_license, has_pledge, has_transfer, has_litigation
ORDER BY application_no
LIMIT 25

question: 想了解机构技术偏好：按权利人统计其TOP3 IPC前缀（前4位），并带上机构省份。
cypher:
MATCH (o:Organization)<-[:OWNED_BY]-(p:Patent)-[:CLASSIFIED_AS]->(ipc:IPCCode)
OPTIONAL MATCH (o)-[:LOCATED_IN]->(loc:Location)
WITH o, loc, substring(ipc.code, 0, 4) AS prefix, count(DISTINCT p) AS cnt
WITH o, loc, prefix, cnt ORDER BY cnt DESC
WITH o, loc, collect({prefix: prefix, cnt: cnt}) AS pref_counts
RETURN o.name AS org, coalesce(loc.province,'未知') AS province, pref_counts[0..3] AS top_prefixes
ORDER BY org
LIMIT 20

question: 请问能否列出专利的技术域及其上级域（若存在PARENT_DOMAIN），用于检查领域层级是否完整？
cypher:
MATCH (p:Patent)-[:BELONGS_TO]->(d:TechDomain)
OPTIONAL MATCH (d)-[:PARENT_DOMAIN]->(parent:TechDomain)
RETURN p.application_no AS application_no, p.title AS title, d.name AS domain, coalesce(parent.name,'无上级') AS parent_domain
ORDER BY application_no
LIMIT 25

question: 想了解：机构所在地的层级关系（Location→PARENT_LOCATION），请列出机构、地点、上一级与上上一级地点名称。
cypher:
MATCH (o:Organization)-[:LOCATED_IN]->(loc:Location)
OPTIONAL MATCH (loc)-[:PARENT_LOCATION]->(pl:Location)
OPTIONAL MATCH (pl)-[:PARENT_LOCATION]->(pl2:Location)
RETURN o.name AS org,
       loc.name AS location,
       coalesce(loc.city,'未知') AS city,
       coalesce(loc.province,'未知') AS province,
       coalesce(pl.name,'-') AS parent1,
       coalesce(pl2.name,'-') AS parent2
ORDER BY org
LIMIT 25

question: 请给我看看：公开国家与申请机构所在国家不一致的专利，并补充其法律状态与IPC列表。
cypher:
MATCH (p:Patent)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(c:Country)
MATCH (p)-[:APPLIED_BY]->(a:Organization)-[:LOCATED_IN]->(al:Location)
WHERE al.country IS NOT NULL AND c.name <> al.country
OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[:HAS_STATUS]->(ls:LegalStatus)
OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[:CLASSIFIED_AS]->(ipc:IPCCode)
WITH p, c, a, al, collect(DISTINCT ls.name) AS statuses, collect(DISTINCT ipc.code) AS ipcs
RETURN p.application_no AS application_no, p.title AS title,
       c.name AS published_country,
       al.country AS applicant_country,
       a.name AS applicant,
       CASE WHEN size(statuses)=0 THEN ['未知'] ELSE statuses END AS statuses,
       ipcs
ORDER BY application_no
LIMIT 20

question: 请分析：哪些专利族同时在CN和US公开，但整个专利族里没有任何成员是授权状态？
cypher:
MATCH (f:PatentFamily)<-[:IN_FAMILY]-(p:Patent)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(c:Country)
WITH f, collect(DISTINCT c.code) AS countries
WHERE 'CN' IN countries AND 'US' IN countries
MATCH (f)<-[:IN_FAMILY]-(p2:Patent)
OPTIONAL MATCH (p2)-[:HAS_STATUS]->(ls:LegalStatus)
WITH f, countries, collect(DISTINCT coalesce(ls.name,'无')) AS statuses, count(DISTINCT p2) AS n
WHERE NOT ('授权' IN statuses)
RETURN f.family_id AS family_id, n AS family_size, countries, statuses
ORDER BY family_size DESC
LIMIT 20

question: 我想知道：各省境外公开专利（非CN）的授权率是多少？（授权数/境外公开总数）
cypher:
MATCH (p:Patent)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(c:Country)
WHERE c.code <> 'CN'
MATCH (p)-[:APPLIED_BY]->(:Organization)-[:LOCATED_IN]->(loc:Location)
OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[:HAS_STATUS]->(ls:LegalStatus)
WITH loc.province AS province,
     count(DISTINCT p) AS total_abroad,
     count(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ls.name = '授权' THEN p END) AS authorized_abroad
RETURN province, total_abroad, authorized_abroad,
       CASE WHEN total_abroad = 0 THEN 0.0 ELSE toFloat(authorized_abroad) / total_abroad END AS abroad_auth_rate
ORDER BY abroad_auth_rate DESC
LIMIT 20

question: 想了解：哪些跨国专利族（公开国家>=2）中，存在H01M成员且该成员还涉诉？
cypher:
MATCH (f:PatentFamily)<-[:IN_FAMILY]-(p:Patent)
WITH f, collect(DISTINCT p) AS ps
WHERE any(x IN ps WHERE EXISTS { MATCH (x)-[:CLASSIFIED_AS]->(ipc:IPCCode) WHERE ipc.code STARTS WITH 'H01M' }
               AND EXISTS { MATCH (x)-[:LITIGATED_WITH]->(:Organization) })
MATCH (f)<-[:IN_FAMILY]-(:Patent)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(c:Country)
WITH f, ps, collect(DISTINCT c.code) AS countries
WHERE size(countries) >= 2
RETURN f.family_id AS family_id, size(ps) AS family_size, countries
ORDER BY family_size DESC
LIMIT 20

question: 请帮忙查一下：发生过转让但缺少权利人记录的专利有哪些？并尽量补全转让双方、法律状态与公开国家。
cypher:
MATCH (p:Patent)
WHERE EXISTS { MATCH (p)-[:TRANSFERRED_TO]->(:Organization) }
  AND NOT EXISTS { MATCH (p)-[:OWNED_BY]->(:Organization) }
OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[:TRANSFERRED_FROM]->(from:Organization)
OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[:TRANSFERRED_TO]->(to:Organization)
OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[:HAS_STATUS]->(ls:LegalStatus)
OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(c:Country)
RETURN p.application_no AS application_no, p.title AS title,
       coalesce(from.name,'未记录') AS transferred_from,
       coalesce(to.name,'未记录') AS transferred_to,
       coalesce(ls.name,'未知') AS status,
       coalesce(c.code,'未知') AS country
ORDER BY application_no
LIMIT 25

question: 请分析：按申请年份统计，在发生过任一业务事件（转让/许可/质押）的专利中，同时发生许可+质押的占比是多少？
cypher:
MATCH (p:Patent)
WITH substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) AS year, collect(DISTINCT p) AS ps
WITH year,
     [x IN ps WHERE EXISTS { MATCH (x)-[:TRANSFERRED_TO]->(:Organization) } OR EXISTS { MATCH (x)-[:LICENSED_TO]->(:Organization) } OR EXISTS { MATCH (x)-[:PLEDGED_TO]->(:Organization) }] AS event_ps,
     [x IN ps WHERE EXISTS { MATCH (x)-[:LICENSED_TO]->(:Organization) } AND EXISTS { MATCH (x)-[:PLEDGED_TO]->(:Organization) }] AS both_ps
RETURN year,
       size(event_ps) AS with_any_event,
       size(both_ps) AS with_license_and_pledge,
       CASE WHEN size(event_ps) = 0 THEN 0.0 ELSE toFloat(size(both_ps)) / size(event_ps) END AS both_share
ORDER BY year DESC
LIMIT 15

question: 我想知道：在DE公开、已授权且IPC为C25B前缀的专利中，哪些是中国机构申请的？
cypher:
MATCH (p:Patent)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(:Country {code:'DE'})
MATCH (p)-[:CLASSIFIED_AS]->(ipc:IPCCode)
WHERE ipc.code STARTS WITH 'C25B'
MATCH (p)-[:HAS_STATUS]->(:LegalStatus {name:'授权'})
MATCH (p)-[:APPLIED_BY]->(o:Organization)-[:LOCATED_IN]->(loc:Location)
WHERE loc.country = '中国'
RETURN DISTINCT p.application_no AS application_no, p.title AS title, o.name AS applicant, loc.province AS province, ipc.code AS ipc
ORDER BY application_no
LIMIT 20

question: 请分析：按公开国家统计，存在涉诉成员的专利族，其平均专利族规模是多少？
cypher:
MATCH (f:PatentFamily)<-[:IN_FAMILY]-(p:Patent)
WITH f, count(DISTINCT p) AS family_size
WHERE EXISTS { MATCH (f)<-[:IN_FAMILY]-(x:Patent)-[:LITIGATED_WITH]->(:Organization) }
MATCH (f)<-[:IN_FAMILY]-(p2:Patent)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(c:Country)
WITH DISTINCT c.code AS country, f, family_size
RETURN country, avg(family_size) AS avg_family_size, count(DISTINCT f) AS families

question: 请问制氢技术里IPC为C25B前缀、但没有在CN公开过的专利有哪些？
cypher:
MATCH (p:Patent)-[:BELONGS_TO]->(:TechDomain {name:'制氢技术'})
MATCH (p)-[:CLASSIFIED_AS]->(ipc:IPCCode)
WHERE ipc.code STARTS WITH 'C25B'
  AND NOT EXISTS { MATCH (p)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(:Country {code:'CN'}) }
RETURN DISTINCT p.application_no AS application_no, p.title AS title, ipc.code AS ipc
ORDER BY application_no
LIMIT 20

question: 请分析：哪些专利存在多个法律状态且发生过转让？并返回转入方及其省份。
cypher:
MATCH (p:Patent)-[:HAS_STATUS]->(ls:LegalStatus)
WITH p, collect(DISTINCT ls.name) AS statuses
WHERE size(statuses) >= 2
  AND EXISTS { MATCH (p)-[:TRANSFERRED_TO]->(:Organization) }
OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[:TRANSFERRED_TO]->(to:Organization)-[:LOCATED_IN]->(loc:Location)
WITH p, statuses, collect(DISTINCT to.name) AS transferees, collect(DISTINCT coalesce(loc.province,'未知')) AS to_provinces
RETURN p.application_no AS application_no, p.title AS title, statuses, transferees AS transferred_to, to_provinces
ORDER BY size(statuses) DESC, application_no
LIMIT 20

question: 我想知道：申请机构在北京市、且专利族公开国家至少3个的专利族有哪些？同时返回该族授权成员数量。
cypher:
MATCH (f:PatentFamily)<-[:IN_FAMILY]-(p:Patent)-[:APPLIED_BY]->(:Organization)-[:LOCATED_IN]->(loc:Location)
WHERE loc.province = '北京市'
WITH DISTINCT f
MATCH (f)<-[:IN_FAMILY]-(m:Patent)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(c:Country)
WITH f, collect(DISTINCT c.code) AS countries
WHERE size(countries) >= 3
MATCH (f)<-[:IN_FAMILY]-(m2:Patent)
OPTIONAL MATCH (m2)-[:HAS_STATUS]->(ls:LegalStatus)
WITH f, countries,
     count(DISTINCT m2) AS family_size,
     count(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ls.name = '授权' THEN m2 END) AS authorized_cnt
RETURN f.family_id AS family_id, family_size, countries, authorized_cnt
ORDER BY size(countries) DESC, authorized_cnt DESC
LIMIT 20
